sessions.intent: Architect Piece 1: Identity Module for runtime2 builder v2

before.assumptions: Runtime2 has IDataSource, MemoryStack with lazy resolvers, module pattern with [Action] handlers. No identity module exists yet.
before.risk: Low — identity is standalone, no dependencies on other new pieces.

sessions.plan: Identity module with 6 actions (create, get, getAll, archive, setDefault, export). IdentityVariable type with [Sensitive] on PrivateKey, ToString()=PublicKey. Storage via System.DataSource table 'identity'. Lazy %MyIdentity% resolver on System MemoryStack. Per-actor variables: %MyIdentity% (System), %Identity% (User), %ServiceIdentity% (Service). New [Sensitive] attribute + SensitivePropertyFilter for two-mode serialization. Ed25519 key generation via NSec, internal to module.

actions.context: Full architecture plan for identity module, designed interactively with Ingi

after.health: Plan approved, branch created, ready for test-designer
after.notes: Key design decisions: per-actor identity (not shared), [Sensitive] attribute for two-mode serialization, System.DataSource storage, lazy auto-create on %MyIdentity% access

sessions.intent: Create test stubs for Identity module (handlers, IdentityVariable, MyIdentity resolver, [Sensitive] attribute, PLang integration)

before.assumptions: Identity module follows settings module pattern — DataSource storage, MemoryStack resolver, handler CRUD actions. [Sensitive] is new infrastructure.
before.risk: Low — test stubs only, no production code

sessions.plan: Write 40 test stubs across 4 C# test files and 8 PLang test goal files covering identity CRUD, variable type, lazy resolver, sensitive attribute filtering, and full-pipeline PLang integration.

actions.context: C# test stubs following SettingsDataTests pattern — engine setup/teardown, Assert.Fail bodies
PLang integration test stubs — Start goal, throw 'not implemented' bodies

after.health: All 40 test stubs created — 32 C# (4 files), 8 PLang (8 directories). Ready for coder.
after.notes: Follows exact patterns from SettingsDataTests.cs and existing PLang test goals.
